system.requirement: When you use an asset's heavy armaments...

abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} and hold your fire for maximum effect, decide the amount of momentum you risk (1, 2, or 3) and add +that amount. On a strong hit, mark progress. On a weak hit or miss, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} equal to 1 + the amount risked (in addition to any other cost).

When you make a move by firing or directing the fire of your heavy armaments, and burn momentum to improve your result, roll your action die. On a 5 or 6, do not reset momentum. Otherwise, take +1 momentum after you reset.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by preparing or loading special ammunition for a volley, roll +supply. On a hit, take +1 momentum. Then, when you first make a move to fire this ammunition, reroll any dice.
